title: The Conference of the Birds
description: The birds of the world journey to find the Simorgh, their king — only to discover that they themselves are the Simorgh.
introduction: The birds of the world journey to find the Simorgh, their king — only to discover that they themselves are the Simorgh.

translation.text: All the birds of the world assembled together.

translation.original_text: سی مرغ بودیم ما همه و سیمرغ ما بودیم
translation.text: We were thirty birds (si murgh) all along, and the Simorgh was us.
